name: Zucchini Soup
recipeIngredient: Chopped chives or paprika - for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the zucchini, chicken broth, green onions, salt, pepper, and dill weed to taste. Cook until the zucchini is soft, about 20-30 minutes.
2. Blend the cream cheese and sour cream in a blender until smooth.
3. Gradually blend in the zucchini mixture into the cream and sour cream blend, adding a portion at a time until fully smooth.
4. Chill overnight or until very cold.
5. Garnish with chopped chives or paprika before serving.
